title: Crackers Con Tomate
summary: You know pan con tomate? Well, this is cracker con tomate! It’s so easy, so quick, and the perfect little snack. You can't get a quicker snack than this.

ingredients.label: 2-3 Large Beef Tomatoes or 4-6 Medium Vine Tomatoes
ingredients.name: Beef Tomato

ingredients.label: 2-3 Large Beef Tomatoes or 4-6 Medium Vine Tomatoes
ingredients.name: Tomato

ingredients.label: 1 Box of Jacob’s Mediterranean Pinch of Salt Crackers
ingredients.name: Cream Cracker

method.description: Grate the tomatoes into a bowl on the largest grating then season generously with salt. Give it a mix then pour into a fine sieve set over the bowl to catch any juices. Leave to sit for 5 mins. Pour off any juices into a glass (drink this with some ice in… it’s so good).
Finely chop the parsley. then add the grated tomatoes back into the bowl with extra virgin olive oil, a squeeze of lemon, parsley, and freshly ground black pepper. Stir and taste for seasoning.
Serve up in a bowl and scoop with crackers, enjoy!

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
